ddls:
CREATE TABLE "medicinal_products" (
  "ma_number" TEXT /* Marketing Authorization number for the product */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code associated with the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the medicinal product */,
  "product_form" TEXT /* Form in which the product is available */,
  "mah" TEXT /* Marketing Authorization Holder */,
  "date_of_expiry" TEXT /* Expiration date of the product */,
  "active_ingredient" TEXT /* Active ingredient(s) in the medicinal product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the medicinal product */,
  "dosage_form" TEXT /* Dosage form of the medicinal product */,
  "packaging_details" TEXT /* Details about the packaging of the medicinal product */,
  "label_claims" TEXT /* Label claims or indications for the medicinal product */,
  "contraindications" TEXT /* Contraindications for the medicinal product */,
  "warnings" TEXT /* Warnings associated with the medicinal product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ma_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the product variant */,
  "ma_number" TEXT /* Marketing Authorization number linking to the medicinal product */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code associated with this specific variant */,
  "variant_description" TEXT /* Description of the variant including formulation and packaging details */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name for the product variant */,
  "strength" TEXT /* Strength of the active ingredient(s) in the product variant */,
  "dosage_instructions" TEXT /* Dosage instructions for the product variant */,
  "shelf_life" INTEGER /* Shelf life of the product variant */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Storage conditions for the product variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_ma_number FOREIGN KEY ("ma_number") REFERENCES medicinal_products ("ma_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "mah_details" (
  "mah_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Marketing Authorization Holder */,
  "mah_name" TEXT /* Name of the Marketing Authorization Holder */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the MAH */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the Marketing Authorization Holder */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the Marketing Authorization Holder */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number of the Marketing Authorization Holder */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the Marketing Authorization Holder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mah_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expiration_tracking" (
  "expiration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expiration record */,
  "ma_number" TEXT /* Marketing Authorization number linking to the medicinal product */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the product */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the product */,
  "manufacturing_date" TEXT /* Manufacturing date of the product */,
  "expiry_date_type" TEXT /* Type of expiration date */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the expiration tracking record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expiration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expiration_tracking_ma_number FOREIGN KEY ("ma_number") REFERENCES medicinal_products ("ma_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_records" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the compliance record */,
  "ma_number" TEXT /* Marketing Authorization number linking to the medicinal product */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date of the compliance check */,
  "compliance_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance check */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance check */,
  "compliance_comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the compliance check */,
  "corrective_actions" TEXT /* Corrective actions taken in response to non-compliance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance record */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments regarding the compliance check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_records_ma_number FOREIGN KEY ("ma_number") REFERENCES medicinal_products ("ma_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "ma_number" TEXT /* Marketing Authorization number of the accessed product */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the user accessed the system */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used to access the system */,
  "browser_info" TEXT /* Information about the browser used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_ma_number FOREIGN KEY ("ma_number") REFERENCES medicinal_products ("ma_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the notification */,
  "ma_number" TEXT /* Marketing Authorization number linking to the medicinal product */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message regarding expiration or compliance */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification */,
  "recipient" TEXT /* Recipient of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_ma_number FOREIGN KEY ("ma_number") REFERENCES medicinal_products ("ma_number")
)
